scripts.vendor:signalr: node -e "const fs=require('fs'), path=require('path'); const dir='src/KeyWars/wwwroot/vendor/signalr'; dir.split(/[\\/]/).reduce((p,s)=>{const n=p?path.join(p,s):s; if(!fs.existsSync(n)) fs.mkdirSync(n); return n;}, ''); fs.copyFileSync('node_modules/@microsoft/signalr/dist/browser/signalr.min.js', path.join(dir,'signalr.min.js')); fs.copyFileSync('node_modules/@microsoft/signalr/dist/browser/signalr.min.js.map', path.join(dir,'signalr.min.js.map'));"
